message:
chore: add secret scanning exclusions for test fixtures

Exclude test files with fake API keys from GitHub secret scanning.
These are test fixtures for the redaction system, not real secrets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+# Exclude test fixtures from secret scanning
+# These files contain fake API keys used for testing the redaction system
+paths-ignore:
+  - "internal/safety/redaction/redaction_test.go"
+  - "docs/REDACTION_SPEC.md"
+  - "testdata/redaction_fixtures.json"
